one_line_summary: Complete, atomic implementation with full hidden-suite pass rate, but ADR/design depth and standards polish are only moderate.
strengths: All required package pieces are present and wired.
Redis Lua approach and in-memory locking show solid concurrency discipline.
weaknesses: ADR is thin and only partially analyzes clock-skew and rejected alternatives.
Design doc is useful but short of the requested depth and failure-mode detail.
API/header behavior is workable but not especially polished or fully spec-oriented.
